title: glandularia setacea
intro: Glandularia setacea, also known as Rosy Verbena, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Americas, characterized by its pink or white flowers and distinctive fragrance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Glandularia setacea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Glandularia setacea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
